title: 2021-2025 Toyota Sienna Hybrid 2nd Row Seat Removal And Airbag Warning Light Disabling
description: Master Technician Viktor G shows how to remove the 2nd row rear seats and bypass the SRS airbag warning light on a 2021-2025 Toyota Sienna Hybrid.
